case_title: YUDAISY MONTES DE OCA VS. BLUE SKY TEAM INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTES DE OCA, YUDAISY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-13-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE SKY TEAM INC. D.B.A.  AUTOLINK
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
JUDGMENT DEBOTR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTIONOF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP. 116.850 - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT BLUE SKY TEAM INC. D.B.A.  AUTOLINK
FILED CHALLENGE TO VENUE. FILED BY DEFENDANT BLUE SKY TEAM INC. D.B.A.  AUTOLINK AS TO PLAINTIFF MONTES DE OCA, YUDAISY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN (506). PLAINTIFF YUDAISY MONTES DE OCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BLUE SKY TEAM INC. PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MOHAMMED FARID DANESHIS. BLUE SKY TEAM, INC. IS FRANCHISE TAX BOARD SUSPENDED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTES DE OCA, YUDAISY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLUE SKY TEAM INC. D.B.A.  AUTOLINK $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, THIS WAS AN AS-IS SALES CONTRACT, BUT DEFENDANT VOLUNTARILY TOOK ON REPAIRS AND NEGLIGENTLY PERFORMED THEM TO PLAINTIFF'S DETRIMENT. PLAINTIFF DAMAGES ARE OFFSET BY THE USE SHE HAD OF THE CAR. DEFENDANT IS FTB-SUSPENDED AND THE COURT CONSIDERED THIS CASE AS IF DEFENDANT DEFAULTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT VENUE IS PROPER IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY THAT THE CONTRACT WAS PERFORMED IN PART IN SAN FRANCISCO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEPONENT BLUE SKY TEAM INC. D.B.A.  AUTOLINK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,065.00 FILED BY MONTES DE OCA, YUDAISY AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE SKY TEAM INC. D.B.A.  AUTOLINK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BLUE SKY TEAM INC. D.B.A.  AUTOLINK
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
